mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, source_target, column_name, data_type, column_index, creator, create_time, updater, update_time FROM ingestion_datasync_field WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY source_target, column_index
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ingestion_datasync_field (id, task_id, source_target, column_name, data_type, column_index, creator, create_time, updater, update_time) VALUES
(#{field.id}, #{field.taskId}, #{field.sourceTarget}, #{field.columnName}, #{field.dataType}, #{field.columnIndex}, #{field.creator}, #{field.createTime}, #{field.updater}, #{field.updateTime})
